'''zaroro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:grabpole|grabpole]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-r-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:grabpole|grabpole]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zaroro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zærereth|zærereth]] || [[word:zærerej|zærerej]] || [[word:zæreresh|zæreresh]] || [[word:zærere|zærere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zarororoth|zarororoth]] || [[word:zarororoj|zarororoj]] || [[word:zarororosh|zarororosh]] || [[word:zarororo|zarororo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zaroroth|zaroroth]] || [[word:zaroroj|zaroroj]] || [[word:zarorosh|zarorosh]] || [[word:zaroro|zaroro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zarofroth|zarofroth]] || [[word:zarofroj|zarofroj]] || [[word:zarofrosh|zarofrosh]] || [[word:zarofrof|zarofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zarorotho|zarorotho]] || [[word:zarorojo|zarorojo]] || [[word:zarorosho|zarorosho]] || [[word:zaroroko|zaroroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zaroroth|zaroroth]] || [[word:zaroroj|zaroroj]] || [[word:zarorosh|zarorosh]] || [[word:zaroro|zaroro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zarorothol|zarorothol]] || [[word:zarorojol|zarorojol]] || [[word:zaroroshol|zaroroshol]] || [[word:zarorokol|zarorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zarorothotho|zarorothotho]] || [[word:zarorojojo|zarorojojo]] || [[word:zaroroshosho|zaroroshosho]] || [[word:zaroroko|zaroroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zarorothon|zarorothon]] || [[word:zarorojon|zarorojon]] || [[word:zaroroshon|zaroroshon]] || [[word:zarorokon|zarorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zarorothoro|zarorothoro]] || [[word:zarorojoro|zarorojoro]] || [[word:zaroroshoro|zaroroshoro]] || [[word:zarorokoro|zarorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
